content.description:
JavaScript/TypeScript mode for CodeMirror. Provides syntax highlighting and tokenization for JavaScript, TypeScript, JSON, and JSON-LD.

## Source

Minified from [jsDelivr](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/codemirror@5.65.16/mode/javascript/javascript.js).

## Supported MIME Types

- `text/javascript`, `application/javascript`
- `text/typescript`, `application/typescript`
- `application/json`, `application/ld+json`

## Dependencies

Requires [codemirror](item://ad3bddac-95ce-41ae-aa11-6f6e6f537bc6) to be loaded first.
